title: Income Tax Return Deadline for Non-Audit Business/Profession Cases Extended to August 31, 2026!
content:
# Income Tax Return Deadline for Non-Audit Business/Profession Cases Extended to August 31, 2026!

Ek important update hai for all non-audit business and profession taxpayers! The government has announced a significant change regarding the Income Tax Return (ITR) filing deadline.

As per news reports on July 21, 2026, the Income Tax Return due date for non-audit business/profession cases has been extended to August 31, 2026. This is not a temporary relief but a permanent legislative change, effective from Assessment Year (AY) 2026-27 (Financial Year 2025-26).

Here are the key details you need to know:

*   **Old Due Date:** For non-audit business and profession cases, the previous due date for filing ITR was July 31st of the assessment year.
*   **New Due Date:** The new, permanent due date for filing Income Tax Returns for non-audit business and profession cases (e.g., those filing ITR-3 or ITR-4) is **August 31, 2026**, for Assessment Year 2026-27 (Financial Year 2025-26).
*   **Legal Basis:** This extension is a permanent amendment to Section 139(1) of the Income Tax Act, brought about by the Finance Act 2026. The Income-Tax Rules, 2026, operationalizing the Income-tax Act, 2025, were notified in the e-Gazette on March 20, 2026.

This change provides taxpayers with an additional month to complete their filings, offering much-needed flexibility. Remember, this applies to individuals and HUFs with income from business or profession who are not required to undergo a tax audit.

## Read the Official Document
*   [Download the Official Income-Tax Rules, 2026, from e-Gazette here](https://egazette.gov.in/(S(umnhz12fnmao5d4oryuyuwl4))/ViewPDF.aspx)

*Published on: 22 July 2026*
